title: fimbristylis doliiformis
intro: Fimbristylis doliiformis, also known as the small cord-grass or doliiform fimbristylis, is a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fimbristylis doliiformis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections, as well as other ailments. Fimbristylis doliiformis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
